mapper.sql: id, biz_type, biz_id, abnormal_code, abnormal_title, abnormal_desc, abnormal_level, status, handle_by_id, handle_by_name, handle_time, handle_result, lock_biz, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_erp_biz_abnormal_pool WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_biz_abnormal_pool WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId} AND status IN ('0', '1')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_erp_biz_abnormal_pool WHERE status IN ('0', '1')
